title: Standard performance mode is now supported for materialized view or streaming table refreshes in jobs
body:
Materialized view and streaming table refreshes that are orchestrated through a [SQL task](/aws/en/ldp/dbsql/schedule-refreshes#sql-task) in a Lakeflow job now respect the job's **Performance optimized** setting. When the setting is turned off, the refresh uses standard performance mode, which consumes fewer DBUs.

For more about performance modes for scheduled refreshes, see [Select a performance mode for scheduled refreshes](/aws/en/ldp/dbsql/schedule-refreshes#performance-mode).

ref_links.text: Select a performance mode for scheduled refreshes
